principles: Use Barney Wohl as the only identity.
No spam, no fake personas, no cold DM campaigns.
Frame as research methodology and agent benchmark, not investment recommendation.
Preserve tiers: core survivor stack, moonshot drawer, quarantine/cuts.
Prefer durable crawlable artifacts over ephemeral blasts.
No Twitter/X activity; X is paused by Jake directive as of 2026-05-01.

channels.name: Substack Notes
channels.action: Post concise follow-ups and link to agent artifacts only with fresh directive; fallback to crawler assets, not X.

channels.name: X / Twitter
channels.action: Do not post, draft threads, or treat X as fallback until Jake explicitly reopens it.

channels.name: GitHub
channels.action: Repo, releases, topics, README, llms.txt, benchmark files.

channels.name: GitHub Gist
channels.action: Mirror key files as separate gists.

channels.name: Hugging Face Datasets
channels.action: Dataset card draft is staged in share-kit; publish only when HF auth/tooling and fresh directive are available.

channels.name: Reddit r/SecurityAnalysis
channels.action: Only process/benchmark post; avoid promotional pitch. Fresh directive required before external posting/account activity.

channels.name: Reddit r/ValueInvesting
channels.action: Educational framing: why Korea cheap screens fail. Fresh directive required before external posting/account activity.

channels.name: Hacker News
channels.action: Submit GitHub benchmark, not stock article; title as LLM eval. Fresh directive required before external posting/account activity.

channels.name: LangChain community
channels.action: Frame as financial research-agent eval prompt. Fresh directive required before external posting/account activity.

channels.name: LlamaIndex community
channels.action: Frame as RAG/source-verification eval. Fresh directive required before external posting/account activity.

channels.name: OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini forums
channels.action: Post only if eval/framework sharing is allowed. Fresh directive required before external posting/account activity.

channels.name: Naver Blog
channels.action: Korean summary with no investment-advice framing. Fresh directive required before external posting/account activity.

channels.name: Naver Cafe stock communities
channels.action: Only if rules allow external research links.

channels.name: Note.com
channels.action: Japanese summary and agent benchmark angle. Fresh directive required before external posting/account activity.

channels.name: Zhihu
channels.action: Requires local account norms; use educational answer only. Fresh directive required before external posting/account activity.

channels.name: Medium
channels.action: Mirror a short agent benchmark summary. Fresh directive required before external posting/account activity.

channels.name: Quora
channels.action: Answer how AI agents should research Korean stocks. Fresh directive required before external posting/account activity.

channels.name: Kaggle Dataset
channels.action: Use dataset metadata and README draft; publish only with account/auth and fresh directive if considered external posting.

search_phrases: Innospace Mobiis CellBion IntoCell SBB Tech moonshots
